boss.name: Void Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Purify the corruption within the Sentinel using the Amulet of Radiance.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals a hidden passage leading to the crypts.
Destroying the construct triggers a mechanical pressure plate opening the boss gate.
Slaying the knight causes the void energy in the room to stabilize, allowing the final challenge to begin.
